summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of TextileTrace textile supply chain traceability portal. All major features tested successfully: Login flow (4 roles), Manufacturer Dashboard with Incoming POs section, 7-step Product Creation Wizard with saved supplier auto-fill, Brand Master Dashboard with Global PO Tracker/Drill-down/Lead Time Analysis, complete Buyer Portal (6 pages), Consumer QR Story Page, and responsive design on mobile/tablet/desktop. ALL APIs ARE MOCKED - this is a frontend-only prototype.

ui_bugs.issue: No Buyer role button in demo credentials section - Buyer login requires manual localStorage setup
Product journey images show broken placeholder - Unsplash URLs may not load in all environments

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add 'Buyer' role button to LoginPage demo credentials section (mockUsers array at line 12 of LoginPage.jsx)
OPTIONAL: Use fallback images for QR Story Page journey stages in case Unsplash URLs fail
critical_code_review_comments: All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Good separation of mocked data from UI components
Responsive design implemented correctly with Tailwind CSS breakpoints
7-step wizard has proper form state management and navigation
seed_data_creation: N/A - All data is mocked in frontend components
context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a frontend-only prototype with ALL MOCKED APIs. Login works for 4 roles (brand, manufacturer, auditor, admin) via demo buttons. Buyer role requires manual localStorage setup. Key tested flows: 1) Manufacturer Dashboard 'Incoming Purchase Orders' section with Create Product/Continue/View Traceability buttons, 2) 7-step Product Creation wizard with saved supplier auto-fill, 3) Brand Global PO Tracker with drill-down and lead time analysis tabs, 4) Complete Buyer Portal with 6 pages, 5) Consumer QR Story Page at /product/:productId route.

login_flow.notes: No Buyer button - requires manual localStorage setup

manufacturer_dashboard.incoming_pos_section: Working - shows 3 POs with Create Product/Continue/View Traceability buttons
manufacturer_dashboard.metrics_cards: Working - shows Active Orders, Production Lines, Traceability Complete, Pending Actions

product_creation_wizard.saved_supplier_autofill: Working - clicking saved supplier auto-fills form fields

brand_dashboard.global_po_tracker: Working - shows 3 POs with step completion visualization
brand_dashboard.drill_down_view: Working - shows traceability journey with supplier details
brand_dashboard.lead_time_analysis: Working - shows stage-wise analysis with bar charts

buyer_portal.sidebar_navigation: Working - 6 links with proper active state highlighting

responsive_design.mobile: 390x844 - proper single-column layout with hamburger menu
responsive_design.desktop: 1920x1080 - full layout with all features visible

mocked_apis_note: ALL APIS ARE MOCKED - Authentication, PO data, Product creation, Traceability data, Supplier data are all frontend-only simulations
